title: FATHIYA Kernel Trigger Conditions
summary: Documents the conditions under which the FATHIYA Kernel activates, including trigger types, activation patterns, and operational boundaries.
key_principles: Kernel activates on operator-provided input, scheduled triggers, or queued task readiness.
Trigger conditions are evaluated against policy boundaries before execution begins.
Each trigger generates a queue entry with provenance tracking.
Kernel respects non-execution boundaries — classification and archival triggers do not produce external side effects.
boundary: Trigger documentation only. Does not activate the kernel or produce side effects.
